title: AgentOps-Bench: A Reproducible Benchmark for Operational Evaluation of Tool-Using LLM Agents
description: AgentOps-Bench is a six-axis evaluation framework for tool-using LLM agents (completion, cost, efficiency, reliability, recovery, safety) with an instrumented tool server, five failure-mode injectors, and a 15-entry indirect prompt-injection catalogue. The v1.0 release ships the harness, 100 seed tasks across five domains (code, data analysis, research, tool use, safety), the snapshotted tool-call fixtures used in the pilot, and a 7,200-run pilot (100 tasks x 3 conditions x 3 runs x 8 agents) with deterministic per-cell SHA-256 RNG seeding. Pilot agents: Claude Haiku 4.5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Opus 4.7, GPT-5.5, DeepSeek-V3.2, Llama-4-Scout, Mistral-Large-2512, Qwen3-Max.
